rows.label: qev075401_MSG0001
rows.name:
...[ST:playername]!
Did you happen to see a strange Earthling
leading some Crust Verdes around here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075401_SEL0011
rows.name: Answer that you haven't seen them.

rows.label: qev075401_JNK0020
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask what on earth happened.

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0002
rows.name:
I see...
Damn it, what's up with those guys![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0003
rows.name:
It happened so suddenly.
While I was camping out, I was attacked by a group of Crust Verdes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0004
rows.name:
While I was camping out,
I was suddenly attacked by a group of Crust Verdes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Taking advantage of the confusion, the Earthling ordering them around
stole my sword...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0006
rows.name:
Guh...
To lose the sword I inherited from Grandpa...
What the hell am I doing!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Listen, I ask this bearing my shame...
Could you help me find my sword?
Please... If I lose that, I...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Thank you.
He should still be around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0009
rows.name:
There shouldn't be any Earthlings around here
leading Crust Verdes besides him,
so we should recognize him at a glance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'll search around this area a bit more,
so you try looking around the Ruins of O'rrh Sim![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0011
rows.name:
...That is something I absolutely need
in order to remain a Hundred Hellion...
I have to get it back, no matter what...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Sorry.
I ended up making you do everything...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_JNK0030
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev075401_SEL0031
rows.name: Worry about Gi Zang's physical condition.

rows.label: qev075401_JNK0040
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask if he found Gi Zang's sword.

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0013
rows.name:
I lost consciousness for a while because I was caught off guard, but
I haven't trained so softly
that I'd be done in by something like that...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0014
rows.name:
...And yes, I found the sword too.
This resolves it... but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Yeah... This guy definitely had it.
But you know...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Ultimately, I'm always being saved by you,
and when it really counts,
I always end up being a burden...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0017
rows.name:
...Maybe I still don't have the right
to wield Grandpa's sword...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Listen... until I surpass you,
could you hold onto this sword for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075401_SEL0051
rows.name: Take custody of Gi Zang's sword.

rows.label: qev075401_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075401_SEL0061
rows.name: Refuse, saying you can't take custody of something so important.

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Thank you.
Please accept this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Precisely because it's important,
it has to be you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I'm having you hold onto it no matter what.
Grandpa would definitely tell me to do this too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0022
rows.name:
Someday, I'll completely surpass you
and take that sword back!
That's when I'll become a true Hundred Hellion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0023
rows.name:
See you later then!
Be prepared for the next time we meet![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0024
rows.name:
Everything's cleared up on this end.
Looks like your end is... perfect too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0025
rows.name:
Hehe!
Against us, guys like these are no match at all![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075401_SEL0071
rows.name: Return a high-five with a smile.

rows.label: qev075401_JNK0080
rows.name: Engage

rows.label: qev075401_SEL0081
rows.name: Challenge Zang to another match.

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0026
rows.name:
If you had been born a Lars,
we would have made a great team, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0027
rows.name:
We definitely wouldn't have lost, even to the Growth!
Really! It's a shame you're an Earthling![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Well, let's have a match next time, okay?
I've been training desperately since then too.
It won't go the same way as before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Seriously?
To make even me exasperated when it comes to matches...
You're a ridiculous person![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0030
rows.name:
Let's do it next time when we're in perfect condition!
I've been training desperately since then too.
It won't go the same way as before![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0031
rows.name:
...Alright! Now that my sword is back,
I'll head back to NLA while beating down
any Growth guys around here as training![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075401_MSG0032
rows.name:
To clear Grandpa and Tolba's regrets,
I have to kill more of them... and become stronger![ST:wait ]
